rag_rules: Address AGREE syntax errors like missing 'annex' keywords or EOF issues.
Focus repairs on the component implementation scope when diagnostics indicate implementation-level references in a component type annex.
generic_rules: Prioritize repairs that align with existing AADL model definitions and visible features.
When AGREE reports type mismatches, adjust helper declarations to match expression types.
Avoid introducing unqualified identifiers or dependencies not present in the AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not modify the AADL architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on contract adjustments.
Avoid adding architecture to fix unresolved references; remove the invalid clause instead.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction details (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, owners)
Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
AGREE contract generation and fusion rules
